description: Formal state-transition specification for Checkmate-Escrow escrow contract

match_states.description: Match created; awaiting deposits from both players
Both players have deposited; game is in progress
Oracle submitted result; awaiting dispute resolution or finalization
Cancelled before activation or expired; stakes refunded

entry_points.name: create_match
preconditions: both players satisfy tier requirements for stake_amount
mutations: Match(id) created with state=Pending, player1_deposited=false, player2_deposited=false
PlayerMatches(player1) appended with new match ID
PlayerMatches(player2) appended with new match ID

entry_points.name: create_match_with_conversion
mutations: Match(id) created with state=Pending, conversion_rate, token_b set

entry_points.name: deposit
preconditions: caller has sufficient token balance and allowance
entry_points.state_transition: Pending → Pending (first deposit) OR Pending → Active (second deposit)
mutations: if both now deposited: state = Active
token transfer executed (stake_amount from caller to contract)

entry_points.name: submit_result
entry_points.state_transition: Active → Completed (if dispute_period == 0) OR Active → PendingResult (if dispute_period > 0)
mutations: if dispute_period == 0: execute_payout (winner or draw refund), state = Completed, completed_ledger set, vested_at set
if dispute_period > 0: state = PendingResult, PendingWinner stored, ResultDeadline set, BalanceSnapshot recorded with reason=ResultSubmitted
winner field set to provided winner

entry_points.name: cancel_match
mutations: refund any deposited stakes to respective players

entry_points.name: resume_match
entry_points.state_transition: Paused → Active (or PendingResult if result was pending before pause)

entry_points.name: finalize_match
mutations: PendingWinner and ResultDeadline entries cleaned up

entry_points.name: dispute_oracle_result
preconditions: no dispute already raised for this match
mutations: Dispute(dispute_id) created with state=Active, uphold_votes=0, overturn_votes=0

entry_points.name: vote_on_dispute
preconditions: caller has not already voted on this dispute
mutations: DisputeVote(dispute_id, caller) set to vote value

entry_points.name: resolve_dispute_by_vote
entry_points.state_transition: PendingResult → Completed (if result upheld) or PendingResult → Cancelled (if overturned)
mutations: dispute.state = ResolvedUpheld (if uphold_votes > overturn_votes) or ResolvedOverturned (if overturn_votes > uphold_votes)
if upheld: execute_payout with stored PendingWinner, match.state = Completed
if overturned: refund both players, match.state = Cancelled

entry_points.name: claim_vested_payout
mutations: token transfer executed (payout amount to caller)

critical_invariants.description: No player receives payout more than once per match
critical_invariants.formalization: for all matches m: (m.player1_claimed && m.player2_claimed) implies exactly one of (winner=Player1 and player2_claimed=false, winner=Player2 and player1_claimed=false, winner=Draw)
critical_invariants.enforcement: execute_payout checks winner field; claim_vested_payout guards with player1_claimed/player2_claimed flags

critical_invariants.description: Total escrowed funds never exceed (stakes deposited), funds are either in escrow or paid out
critical_invariants.formalization: sum of escrow_balances(all matches) == sum of stakes (active matches with both deposits) + sum of refunded/paid-out amounts
critical_invariants.enforcement: execute_payout atomically transfers all escrowed funds; cancel_match refunds; snapshots audit

critical_invariants.description: Match state only progresses forward or resets under specific conditions; no backward transitions except Paused
critical_invariants.formalization: Pending→Active→Completed; Pending→Cancelled; Paused can transition to Active/PendingResult/Completed and back
critical_invariants.enforcement: explicit state checks in every entry point; state enum guards

critical_invariants.description: Transition to Active requires both players to have deposited
critical_invariants.enforcement: deposit() only sets state=Active when both flags are true

critical_invariants.description: Only the configured oracle can submit results
critical_invariants.formalization: submit_result caller must equal stored Oracle address

critical_invariants.description: Completed and Cancelled states are terminal
critical_invariants.formalization: if state in [Completed, Cancelled] then no further state changes
critical_invariants.enforcement: all state-mutating entry points check state != Completed && state != Cancelled

critical_invariants.description: Every match has a unique ID; no ID reuse
critical_invariants.formalization: MatchCount is monotonically increasing; new match always gets MatchCount as ID
critical_invariants.enforcement: create_match uses MatchCount and increments it atomically

critical_invariants.description: No two matches can reference the same external game_id
critical_invariants.formalization: GameId(game_id) can only be set once
critical_invariants.enforcement: create_match checks if GameId exists, rejects if already set

critical_invariants.description: A match in PendingResult state will eventually reach Completed or Cancelled after dispute period or vote resolution
critical_invariants.formalization: if state==PendingResult then finalize_match or resolve_dispute_by_vote will transition to terminal state
critical_invariants.enforcement: finalize_match and resolve_dispute_by_vote enforce deadline/vote logic

critical_invariants.description: escrow_balance snapshots match actual token balances held by contract
critical_invariants.formalization: for all snapshots s: s.escrow_balance == sum of stakes for non-terminal matches + sum of staged payouts
critical_invariants.enforcement: execute_payout transfers all funds; snapshots record at each transition
